name: Cascade Desktop Automation
description: Control Windows desktop apps and web browsers through OpenClaw. Provides desktop automation, web automation with Playwright, and skill learning capabilities.

cascadeGrpcEndpoint.description: gRPC endpoint for Cascade Body (format: host:port)

cascadePythonPath.description: Path to Python executable (optional, auto-detected if not set)

firestoreProjectId.description: Firebase project ID for skill storage (optional)

firestoreCredentialsPath.description: Path to Firebase service account JSON (optional)

headless.description: Run Playwright in headless mode (no visible browser window)

actionTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for UI actions in milliseconds

allowedAgents.description: Which agents OpenClaw is allowed to call (requires enableA2A: true)

requireAgentConfirmation.description: Require user confirmation before calling agents

verbose.description: Include debug information in error messages

screenshotMode.description: How to handle screenshots: embed in response, save to disk, or auto-decide based on size

screenshotDir.description: Directory to save screenshots when mode is 'disk' or 'auto' (default: ~/.openclaw/screenshots)

headless.label: Headless Mode
headless.description: Run browser automation without visible window

enableA2A.label: Enable Agent Communication
enableA2A.description: Allow OpenClaw to call Cascade agents (Explorer, Worker, Orchestrator)

requireAgentConfirmation.label: Require Confirmation
requireAgentConfirmation.description: Ask for confirmation before calling agents

verbose.label: Verbose Mode
verbose.description: Include debug details in error messages
